component.name: Vitals
component.summary: Monitor your computer's CPU, memory, disk, network, battery, and GPU vitals

description.p: Vitals is a system monitor that displays real-time information about your computer's hardware including CPU temperature, memory usage, disk I/O, network speed, battery health, fan speed, voltage, and GPU statistics.

ul.li: CPU usage, frequency, and temperature monitoring
Disk usage and I/O speed monitoring
Network upload/download speed and public IP detection
Configurable update intervals and display options

description.p: Initial release of the native Rust application.
